description: island in the North Atlantic Ocean
description_wiki: Ireland is an island in the North Atlantic Ocean, in Northwestern Europe.

aliases: Queen City of the Pacific and others
description_wiki: Manila, officially the City of Manila, is the capital and second-most populous city of the Philippines after Quezon City.
The Philippines, officially the Republic of the Philippines, is an archipelagic country in Southeast Asia.

aliases: Ground forces of the United States Armed Forces
description: land service branch of the United States Armed Forces
description_wiki: The United States Army (U.S. Army) is the land service branch of the United States Armed Forces.

description: armed conflict in Vietnam, Laos, and Cambodia between North Vietnam and South Vietnam, from 1955 to 1975
description_wiki: The Vietnam War (1 November 1955 – 30 April 1975) was an armed conflict in Vietnam, Laos, and Cambodia fought between North Vietnam (Democratic Republic of Vietnam) and South Vietnam (Republic of Vietnam) and their allies.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: California () is a state in the Western United States that lies on the Pacific Coast.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: Hawaii (  hə-WY-ee; Hawaiian: Hawaiʻi [həˈvɐjʔi, həˈwɐjʔi]) is an island state of the United States, in the Pacific Ocean about 2,000 miles (3,200 km) southwest of the U.S. mainland.

description: exchange program, groups of people from different countries visit each other
description_wiki: A student exchange program is a program in which students from a secondary school (high school) or higher education study abroad at one of their institution's partner institutions.

description: city and county seat of Cook County, and largest city in State of Illinois, United States of America
description_wiki: Chicago is the most populous city in the U.S. state of Illinois and in the Midwestern United States.

description: city in Essex County, and largest city in New Jersey, United States
description_wiki: Newark ( NEW-ərk, locally ) is the most populous city in the U.S. state of New Jersey, the county seat of Essex County, and a principal city of the New York metropolitan area.
